ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Creating Mesh Lights
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Creating Mesh Lights（创建网格灯）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Any piece of geometry can become a light source in RenderMan for Maya.  Select the geometry that should become emissive and click on the Mesh Light button in the RenderMan shelf.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 在 RenderMan for Maya 中，任何一块 geometry 都可以成为 light source。选择要变为 emissive 的 geometry，然后单击 RenderMan shelf 中的 Mesh Light 按钮。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The next time you render, the object will cast light and itself have a constant color which comes from the PxrMeshLight's color and intensity.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 下次 render 时，该 object 会投射 light，并且自身具有 constant color；该颜色来自 PxrMeshLight 的 color 和 intensity。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: When the Mesh Light button is clicked, a new material called PxrBlack is assigned to the selection, and a PxrMeshLigh
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 单击 Mesh Light 按钮时，会将名为 PxrBlack 的新 material 指派给所选对象，并创建一个 PxrMeshLigh

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: is created and wired into the shading group of the PxrBlack material.  PxrBlack acts as a dummy material.  It doesn't actually have any parameters, although in the Attribute Editor a link is provided to the associated PxrMeshLight.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ，再将其连接到 PxrBlack material 的 shading group 中。PxrBlack 充当 dummy material。它实际上没有任何 parameters，不过在 Attribute Editor 中会提供一个指向关联 PxrMeshLight 的链接。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: For most purposes PxrBlack is an appropriate material, but you can experiment with using others, like PxrVolume.  The easiest way to set that up is to begin with the Mesh Light button.  Then, select the shading group for the PxrBlack and wire in a different surface or volume material there.  This way the area light is already wired in to the shading group.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 对于大多数用途，PxrBlack 是合适的 material；但你也可以尝试使用其他 material，例如 PxrVolume。最简单的设置方式是先使用 Mesh Light 按钮。然后选择 PxrBlack 的 shading group，并在那里接入不同的 surface 或 volume material。这样 area light 就已经连接到 shading group 中。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: PxrMeshLight
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: PxrMeshLight

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: PxrMeshLights behave much like other lights in Maya.  They show up under the lights tab in the Hypershade Window and light linking can be set up in Maya's Relationship Editor.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: PxrMeshLights 的行为与 Maya 中其他 lights 很相似。它们会显示在 Hypershade Window 的 lights 选项卡下，并且可以在 Maya 的 Relationship Editor 中设置 light linking。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: PxrMeshLight allows you to create arbitrary shapes and use them as bonafide light sources. This improves performance over emissive geometry and provides great flexibility for creating things like neon lights, futuristic light panels, and deforming shapes that light a scene.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: PxrMeshLight 允许你创建 arbitrary shapes，并将它们用作真正的 light sources。与 emissive geometry 相比，这会提升 performance，并为创建 neon lights、未来感 light panels，以及能照亮 scene 的 deforming shapes 提供很高的 flexibility。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The parameters are simple and easy to tune and the light follows the shape's render visibility as opposed to selections on the light.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 这些 parameters 简单且易于调节，并且该 light 会遵循 shape 的 render visibility，而不是 light 本身上的选择项。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: While you may use a meshlight as a deforming piece of geometry, deformation motion blur is not yet supported and could provide incorrect results.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 虽然可以将 meshlight 用作一块 deforming geometry，但目前尚不支持 deformation motion blur，可能会产生不正确的结果。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The color of the emitted light.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: emitted light 的 color。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Scales the contribution of this light linearly. The light intensity is computed using physical falloff.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 线性缩放此 light 的贡献。light intensity 使用 physical falloff 计算。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Specifies the exposure of the area light as a power of 2. Increasing the exposure by 1 will double the energy emitted by the light source. A value of 0 produces an intensity of 1 at the source, -1 produces 0.5. R
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 以 2 的幂指定 area light 的 exposure。exposure 增加 1 会使 light source 发出的 energy 加倍。值为 0 时 source 处的 intensity 为 1，-1 时为 0.5。现实世界

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Texture Color
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Texture Color（纹理颜色）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: An image to use as a light source using a pattern node, e.g.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 使用 pattern node 将一张 image 用作 light source，例如

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: . Preferably a High Dynamic Range source. Notice this affects color and shadowing based on the contents of the HDRI used. If forced to use an 8-bit source such as a JPEG image, it should be linearized (transformed to linear color space) before use as a color. Since this is indeed a mesh, you must have defined UVs or appropriate projections to place your texture correctly.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 。最好使用 High Dynamic Range source。请注意，这会根据所用 HDRI 的内容影响 color 和 shadowing。如果必须使用 JPEG image 等 8-bit source，应先将其 linearized（转换到 linear color space），再作为 color 使用。由于这确实是一个 mesh，你必须已经定义 UVs 或适当的 projections，才能正确放置 texture。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Enable Temperature
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Enable Temperature（启用色温）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Turns color temperature on or off.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 打开或关闭 color temperature。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Allow the user to choose the color temperature of the light in Kelvins. Unlike the basic light color, this allows the user to easily pick plausible light colors based on standard temperature measurements.This control will act like a filter or gel (a tinted transparent surface) in front of your light. If your light is white, you will get the chosen color temperature. If your light is colored, the color temperature will make it cooler (over 6500K) or warmer (below 6500K).
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 允许用户以 Kelvins 选择 light 的 color temperature。与基础 light color 不同，这让用户能够基于标准 temperature measurements 轻松选择可信的 light colors。此 control 会像放在 light 前方的 filter 或 gel（带色透明表面）一样工作。如果 light 是白色，你会得到所选 color temperature。如果 light 已有颜色，color temperature 会让它更冷（高于 6500K）或更暖（低于 6500K）。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: The effect will be less pronounced on fully saturated mono-chromatic lights. Defaults to 6500K, which should be very close to white on most monitors (D65 illuminant used by sRGB and Rec 709).
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 在 fully saturated mono-chromatic lights 上，此效果会不那么明显。默认值为 6500K，在大多数 monitor 上应非常接近白色（sRGB 和 Rec 709 使用的 D65 illuminant）。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Specular Amount
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Specular Amount（高光量）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Amount of specular light that is emitted. This is a non-physical control. You could use a light with
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 发出的 specular light 的量。这是一个 non-physical control。你可以使用

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Specular Amount
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Specular Amount

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: 0.0 to act purely as a source of diffuse light for your scene objects and avoid adding highlights.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 为 0.0 的 light，使其仅作为 scene objects 的 diffuse light source，并避免添加 highlights。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Diffuse Amount
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Diffuse Amount（漫反射量）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Amount of diffuse light that is emitted. This is a non-physical control. You could use a light with
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 发出的 diffuse light 的量。这是一个 non-physical control。你可以使用

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Diffuse Amount
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Diffuse Amount

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: 0.0 to act purely as a source of highlights for your scene objects.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 为 0.0 的 light，使其仅作为 scene objects 的 highlights source。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Intensity Near Dist
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Intensity Near Dist（强度近距离）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Specular Near Dist
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Specular Near Dist（高光近距离）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Near distance between the point with specular shading being illuminated and the light at which the sample doesn't get brighter. This may help you avoid hot spots and sampling issues where a light is near a specular surface.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 带有 specular shading 的被照明点与 light 之间的近距离；在该距离内 sample 不会继续变亮。当 light 靠近 specular surface 时，这有助于避免 hot spots 和 sampling issues。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Diffuse Near Dist
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Diffuse Near Dist（漫反射近距离）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Near distance between the point with diffuse shading being illuminated and the light at which the sample doesn't get brighter. This may help you avoid hot spots and sampling issues where a light is near a diffuse surface.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 带有 diffuse shading 的被照明点与 light 之间的近距离；在该距离内 sample 不会继续变亮。当 light 靠近 diffuse surface 时，这有助于避免 hot spots 和 sampling issues。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Area Normalize
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Area Normalize（面积归一化）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: When normalize is enabled, the amount of light contributed to the scene will not change as you scale the light source. This makes it easier to adjust highlight size without changing scene lighting.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 启用 normalize 时，随着你缩放 light source，贡献到 scene 的 light amount 不会改变。这样可以更容易地调整 highlight size，而不改变 scene lighting。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Trace Light Paths
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Trace Light Paths（追踪灯光路径）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Enable light and photon tracing from this light. This value enforces a physically-based light and as a side-effect disables the above
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 启用来自此 light 的 light tracing 和 photon tracing。此值会强制使用 physically-based light，并且作为副作用会禁用上面的

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: controls. Users may use this feature to selectively decide which lights emit photons when using the PxrVCM or PxrUnified Integrators.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: controls。使用 PxrVCM 或 PxrUnified Integrators 时，用户可以用此功能有选择地决定哪些 lights 发射 photons。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Enable thin shadow and disable refraction caustics for this light. This parameter will ignored if
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 为此 light 启用 thin shadow，并禁用 refraction caustics。如果启用了

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Trace Light Paths
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Trace Light Paths

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: is enabled. This is a non-physical control that creates "fake" colored shadows for transmissive objects without needing to generate photons for caustics.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ，则会忽略此 parameter。这是一个 non-physical control，会为 transmissive objects 创建 "fake" colored shadows，而无需为 caustics 生成 photons。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Specify the light group name used for light group LPEs. This is useful to generate per-light AOVs for later adjustment in compositing.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: 指定用于 light group LPEs 的 light group name。这对于生成 per-light AOVs 以便之后在 compositing 中调整很有用。

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: Importance Multiplier
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: Importance Multiplier（重要性倍增器）

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: samples to be selected from this light while reducing it for others in the scene. Lower than the default will
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: samples，同时减少 scene 中其他 lights 的 samples。低于默认值则会使 samples

ascii_heavy_candidates.source: the samples while providing more to others in the scene.
ascii_heavy_candidates.translation: ，并为 scene 中其他 lights 提供更多 samples。
